hero.headline: Where Space Becomes Sanctuary
hero.subtitle: Luxury interior design in Kasaragod, Kerala — crafting serene, intentional spaces for homes and businesses.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.headline: The Oasis Concept
philosophy.body1: We believe every space has the potential to become a sanctuary. WAHA Interiors designs environments that provide calm, beauty, and a profound sense of belonging.
philosophy.body2: Our work is rooted in Kasaragod's natural richness — the lush greenery, the quiet backwaters, the warm light. We bring that into every room we design.

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Our Services
services.subtitle: From residential villas to commercial spaces, we bring thoughtful design to every project in Kasaragod and beyond.

projects.label: Our Work
projects.headline: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of our work across Kasaragod, Mogral, and Kerala.

blog.label: Insights
blog.headline: Design Inspiration
blog.subtitle: Articles on interior design trends for Kerala homes and businesses.

contact.label: Let's Connect
contact.headline: Let's Create Something Beautiful
contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your space? Tell us about your project and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success: Inquiry sent! We'll contact you within 24 hours.

about.label: Our Story
about.headline: Designing Kasaragod's Future
about.subtitle: WAHA Interiors was born from a deep love for beautiful spaces and a desire to bring world-class interior design to Kasaragod, Kerala.

values.label: Our Values
values.serenityDesc: Every space we design is a calm retreat from the everyday.
values.precisionDesc: Details matter. We sweat every measurement, material, and finish.
values.authenticityDesc: Our designs reflect you — not trends, not templates.
values.excellenceDesc: We do not stop until the space is exactly right.

timeline.label: Our Journey
timeline.2022: WAHA Interiors founded in Kasaragod with a vision to transform local spaces.
timeline.2023: First commercial projects completed in Kasaragod town. Portfolio grows to 15 projects.
timeline.2024: Expanded services to Mangalore region. Recognized for Mogral heritage restoration.
timeline.2025: 50+ projects completed across Kerala. Launched landscape design division.
